_comment: Quality floors — these values can only improve, never regress. CI and immune-gate.sh enforce this. Updated automatically when metrics improve.
_floor_realignment_note: v9: eslintErrors tightened 404→125 after removing unused-import/unused-var/no-useless-escape errors across 50+ files (safe removals only — no logic changes). tsErrors=0, Math.random=0, as-any=0 maintained.
_e2ePassRate_note: Raised to 1.0 — e2e/polish/page-sweep.spec.ts sweeps all 28 demo pages at desktop viewport; 28/28 passing.

_targets._comment: Where we want to be in 6 months — the organism moves floor values toward these targets

_e2eActual_note: 28/28 page-e2e desktop tests passing as of 2026-04-30 (polish sweep spec landed in e2e/polish/page-sweep.spec.ts).
_note: Zero means zero. Rules we disagree with are deliberately downgraded to warnings in eslint.config.js. Everything remaining as an error must be zero.
